metadata.name: Digit Occurrence Trading Bot
metadata.description: Deriv DBot that operates under 4-tick candles with digit frequency constraints and consecutive hit entry conditions
metadata.author: Trading Bot Generator

strategy.description:
Trading strategy based on digit occurrence frequency and consecutive hit patterns.
Frequency Constraints: - Digits 0-4 must remain under 10% - Digits 6-9 must be above 10.5%
Entry Conditions: - Trigger entry after four consecutive hits on digits 6-9 - Followed by two consecutive hits on digits 0-3

entry_conditions.phase_description: WAITING: Monitoring frequency constraints HIGH_DIGITS: Frequency met, awaiting 4 consecutive high digits LOW_DIGITS: 4 consecutive high digits achieved, awaiting 2 consecutive low digits READY: Entry condition met, execute trade

step.name: Extract Digit
step.description: Extract the last digit from the close price

step.name: Update Occurrences
step.description: Track digit occurrence and calculate frequencies

step.name: Calculate Percentages
step.description: Calculate frequency percentages for digit groups

step.name: Check Frequency Constraints
step.description: Verify if frequency constraints are satisfied

step.name: Reset on Neutral
step.description: Reset counters when digit 5 is encountered

step.name: Phase Management
step.description: Manage bot phase transitions based on conditions

transition.action: Log: Frequency constraints met. Awaiting 4 consecutive high digits...
Log: 4 consecutive high digits detected! Awaiting 2 consecutive low digits...
Log: ENTRY CONDITION MET! Execute trade.

step.name: Execute Trade
step.description: Execute trade when all conditions are met

condition.name: Frequency Constraint - Low Digits
condition.description: Occurrences of digits 0-4 must remain below 10%

condition.name: Frequency Constraint - High Digits
condition.description: Occurrences of digits 6-9 must be above 10.5%

condition.name: Consecutive High Digits
condition.description: Must observe 4 consecutive ticks with digits 6, 7, 8, or 9

condition.name: Consecutive Low Digits
condition.description: After 4 high digits, must observe 2 consecutive ticks with digits 0, 1, 2, or 3

condition.name: Manual Exit
condition.description: Exit can be triggered manually or by external signals

logs.log_entry: Each tick: Price, Digit, Phase, Status
Every 10 ticks: Detailed status report with percentages and counters
On entry: Trade entry details with all condition values

status_report.field: Whether a trade is currently open

steps.step: Ticks 1-50: Random digits sampled, low = 9.8%, high = 10.8%
Tick 56: Digit 1 (low) - consecutiveLowDigits = 2 → Phase = READY → TRADE EXECUTED

example.name: Scenario 2: Reset on Interruption
example.description: Example of counter reset due to interrupting digit

example.name: Scenario 3: Constraint Not Met
example.description: Example of waiting for constraints to be met

steps.step: Phase remains WAITING - constraints not satisfied
Ticks 31-50: Frequency shifts to low = 9.8%, high = 10.8%
Constraints now met, phase transitions to HIGH_DIGITS
Bot begins tracking consecutive high digits

performance_notes.note: Frequency percentages stabilize after 50-100 ticks of data collection
Consecutive counters reset on any interrupting digit or neutral digit (5)
Entry signals are only generated when ALL conditions are simultaneously met
State persists across candles to maintain frequency tracking accuracy
Bot remains in WAITING phase until frequency constraints are satisfied

parameter.name: consecutive_high_target
parameter.description: Required consecutive high digits (6-9) for phase progression

parameter.name: consecutive_low_target
parameter.description: Required consecutive low digits (0-3) for entry signal

installation.step: Set trade size and risk management rules
